/usr/lib64/ccache/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libfawkes_protobuf_clips.so -o /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkes_protobuf_clips.so CMakeFiles/fawkes_protobuf_clips.dir/communicator.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib -lstdc++ -lm /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkeslogging.so /usr/lib64/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib64/libprotobuf.so -lprotobuf_comm -lboost_thread -lboost_system -L/usr/lib64 -lprotobuf -lcrypto -L/usr/lib64 -lclipsmm -lm -lncurses -ltermcap -lrt -lclips -lglibmm-2.4 -lgobject-2.0 -lsigc-2.0 -lgthread-2.0 -pthread -lglib-2.0 /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkescore.so -lm -lrt -lpthread -lstdc++
